impact_method: AR6 GWP100 from openLCA unit-process exchanges
notes: Derived from openLCA export of ecoinvent 3.12 Cutoff Unit with EN15804: direct Methane non-fossil 0.0024 kg/kg and Dinitrogen monoxide 0.000033 kg/kg; fossil CO2 direct exchange not present; biogenic CO2 excluded; CH4 GWP100=27.2 and N2O GWP100=273

process_name: treatment of biowaste by anaerobic digestion
impact_method: derived from 3.12 biogas yield and 3.12 net calorific value
notes: Biogas yield from ecoinvent 3.12 openLCA export = 0.1 m3/kg biowaste; methane-equivalent share derived from ecoinvent 3.12 biogas net calorific value 22.73 MJ/m3 divided by CH4 LHV 35.8 MJ/m3 = 0.6349; converted using CH4 LHV 9.97 kWh/m3 and conservative 30% electrical efficiency
